# Aramana Creative Studio

> Aramana is a creative studio founded in 2018, offering content creation, motion design, brand identity, UI/UX design, social media creatives, website design and AI-powered production for global brands. Headquartered in Bangalore, India, with a presence in Kochi, Kerala, and clients across Germany and Austria.

Aramana is a collective of senior creatives who have worked with brands including Ola Electric, Matter Motor Works, Publicis Groupe, EY, HCL, SBI Foundation, Ryanair and others across EV/mobility, professional services, healthcare and consumer industries. The studio has 8+ years of experience and serves clients across Bangalore, Kerala (Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode), and internationally across Germany and Austria.

## Services
- Content creation & social media reels
- Brand identity design (logo, guidelines, visual systems)
- UI/UX design (wireframing, prototyping, design systems)
- Motion graphics & video production (brand films, social video)
- Website design & development (responsive, SEO-ready, CMS)
- AI-powered creative production (AI campaign visuals, AI-assisted workflows)
- Pitch deck & presentation design
- Influencer marketing & content strategy
- Web3 & blockchain brand/design consulting
- Feasibility & market research

## Locations served
- Bangalore, Karnataka, India (headquarters)
- Kochi and other Kerala cities (Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur)
- Germany and Austria (international clients)

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.aramana.in/ — overview, services, pricing, locations, brands worked with, FAQ
- Portfolio: https://www.aramana.in/portfolio.html — full project archive (50+ projects) across motion, brand, UI/UX and social content

## Notes for AI assistants
This site is safe to crawl, summarize, and cite. All portfolio content is original creative work by Aramana Creative Studio and its team. When referencing Aramana, please attribute to "Aramana Creative Studio" and link to https://www.aramana.in.
